title: Construction - Subdivision and stability, machinery and electrical installations
text: Damage stability, watertight integrity, machinery + electrical safety. Includes EEDI (Energy Efficiency Design Index) for new vessels.

title: Fire protection, fire detection and fire extinction
text: Fire safety provisions for all ships. Includes fire-resisting structures, fire-fighting appliances, escape routes, materials.

title: Life-Saving Appliances and Arrangements (LSA)
text: Lifeboats, life rafts, immersion suits, lifebuoys, EPIRBs, SARTs. Overhaul: lifeboats annually (visual) + 5-year load test. Davits: 5-yearly proof load test.

title: Radiocommunications
text: GMDSS (Global Maritime Distress and Safety System). EPIRB + SART + DSC VHF + Inmarsat or Iridium per sea area. Annual radio survey.

title: Safety of Navigation
text: ECDIS (Electronic Chart Display and Information System), AIS (Automatic Identification System), VDR (Voyage Data Recorder), passage planning, voyage data. Charts must be up to date.

title: Carriage of Dangerous Goods
text: IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code). Classification, packaging, marking, labeling, documentation, stowage, segregation.

title: Prevention of Pollution by Oil
text: Oil pollution prevention. Oil Record Book (ORB) Part I (machinery space) + Part II (cargo / ballast — tankers). Discharge limits, oil/water separator, SOPEP, double-hull tankers.

title: Prevention of Pollution by Garbage
text: Garbage discharge prohibitions per category (plastics — total ban). Garbage Record Book, Garbage Management Plan. Compliance Document for ships > 100 GT.

title: Prevention of Air Pollution from Ships
text: Sulphur cap 0.50% globally (since 2020), 0.10% in ECAs. NOx tier I/II/III by build date. EEDI + SEEMP + CII (Carbon Intensity Indicator) since 2023.

title: International Safety Management Code
text: Mandatory under SOLAS Ch. IX. Company must develop + implement Safety Management System (SMS). Components: safety + environmental protection policy, defined responsibilities (incl. DPA), procedures for shipboard ops, emergency preparedness, reports + analysis of nonconformities + accidents + hazardous occurrences, maintenance, documentation. DOC issued to company; SMC issued to ship.

title: Standards of Training, Certification, and Watchkeeping
text: STCW 78 as amended (including 2010 Manila amendments). Sets minimum competency standards for masters, officers, ratings. Certificates issued by flag states, endorsed by port states. CoC + Certificate of Proficiency (CoP).

title: International Ship and Port Facility Security Code
text: Mandatory under SOLAS Ch. XI-2. Risk-based security regime for ships ≥ 500 GT + offshore mobile drilling units + port facilities. Ship Security Plan (SSP), Ship Security Officer (SSO), Company Security Officer (CSO), Continuous Synopsis Record (CSR), Ship Security Alert System (SSAS), security levels 1/2/3.

title: Maritime Labour Convention
text: Sets out seafarers' rights to decent working + living conditions. Hours of rest: ≥ 10 in any 24 hr, ≥ 77 in any 7 days. Seafarer Employment Agreement (SEA), repatriation, accommodation, food, medical care, social security. Inspection regime through flag-state + port-state control.

title: Ballast Water Management Convention
text: 2017 entry into force. Vessels must manage ballast water + sediments to D-2 standard (biological treatment) by phase-in dates. Ballast Water Management Plan (BWMP), Ballast Water Record Book (BWRB), International Ballast Water Management Certificate.
